scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @huaweicloud/taurusdb-core && npm run build --workspace @huaweicloud/taurusdb-mcp
scripts.check: npm run check --workspace @huaweicloud/taurusdb-core && npm run check --workspace @huaweicloud/taurusdb-mcp
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test --workspace @huaweicloud/taurusdb-core && npm run test --workspace @huaweicloud/taurusdb-mcp
